title: Example 3—Multiple gpfdists instances
originalFilePath: >-
  https://github.com/warehouse-pg/whpg-docs/blob/main/docs/docs/7x/admin_guide/external/external-tables/creating-external-tables---examples/example-3-multiple-gpfdists-instances.md
editTarget: originalFilePath

---

Creates a readable external table, *ext_expenses,* from all files with the *txt* extension using the `gpfdists` protocol. The column delimiter is a pipe ( \| ) and NULL (' ') is a space. For information about the location of security certificates, see [gpfdists:// Protocol](../gpfdists-protocol.mdx).

1.  Run `gpfdist` with the `--ssl` option.
2.  Run the following command.

    ```
    =# CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE ext_expenses ( name text, 
       date date,  amount float4, category text, desc1 text ) 
       LOCATION ('gpfdists://etlhost-1:8081/*.txt', 
                 'gpfdists://etlhost-2:8082/*.txt')
       FORMAT 'TEXT' ( DELIMITER '|' NULL ' ') ;

    ```

**Parent topic:** [Examples for Creating External Tables](./)
